{{Relic Infobox|Seal of Gold|2}}{{Keyword Infobox|Energy|2}}{{Keyword Infobox|Gold|2}}
{{R|Seal of Gold||2}} is an {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Ancient|Ancient|2}} {{2|Relics|Relic}}. After pickup, you will lose 5 Gold to gain {{Icon|CE|2}} at the start of each turn.

== Sources ==
Can be offered at the start of [[StS2:Acts#Act 2|Act 2]] by {{KW|Tezcatara||2}}.

===Spawn Restrictions===
*Because '''Seal of Gold''' shares a relic pool with {{R|Biiig Hug||2}}, {{R|Storybook||2}}, and {{R|Toasty Mittens||2}}, only 1 of the 4 can be offered by {{KW|Tezcatara||2}}.

== Notes ==
* If you have less than 5 Gold, you will not gain {{Icon|CE|2}} (or lose any Gold).

== Update History ==
*'''Early Access v0.105.0 (BETA)'''
**Moved Tezcatara's Seal of Gold relic to pool 3 so that it is in the same pool as Pumpkin Candle.
*'''Early Access v0.98'''
**Added Seal of Gold to the game.
